programmes.show_description: Dancing' A-With My Cells: Annoyed with the kids' refusal to take anything seriously, Stan tries DNA splicing at the CIA lab, but things soon get out of hand.
Crows Encounters of the Bird Kind: Animated comedy. Tina tries to get a birdwatching badge for her Thundergirls sash but runs afoul of a ranger and endangers some local birds.
These Boots Are Made for Stalking: Animated comedy. Tina tries desperately to connect with cool teenagers who visit the restaurant, and Gene and Louise face off in a strange duel.
Reality series. Princess faces big decisions on moving out, money, and her beauty launch while also going on a girls' holiday to Dubai after facing an online backlash from a post.
The New Slave: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Grumio finds that his position in the household is gradually usurped when the boys buy an eccentric slave called Mushki at an auction.
Shopping from home.
Mystery Solvers Club State Finals: Animated adventures. The Mystery Inc gang is invited to compete in the annual Teen Mystery Solvers' Convention.
The Wild Brood: Animated adventures. When valuable equipment begins disappearing from around town, all fingers point to the orcs. It is up to Daphne alone to prove their innocence.
Sorcerer Snack Scare: Animated adventure series. Shaggy and Scooby discover a new favourite food as the gang investigates the mystery of a frightening Sorcerer at a snack factory!
Saga of the Swamp Beast: Animated adventure series. The gang's trip to a bayou is ruined by a shambling swamp beast that's scaring away anyone who dares to enter its soggy domain!
Matt Edmondson narrates this series about the most entertaining Guinness World Records and the brilliant characters who set them as captured by TV shows around the globe.
Waterfront Estate Miami: House-hunting show. The Cecelia family have been living between Brazil and Miami, but now they want a property in Florida to move into permanently.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Nelly takes centre stage as the family create their first TikTok, and Greg is left at home with three kids when Billie jets off for a photoshoot in the sun.
Reality series. Love is in the air as the Bali trip comes to a close and Jordan surprises Sophie with a lavish romantic date, but will Sophie think a proposal is on the cards?
Row, Row, Row Me Off This Boat: US reality series. Lisa loses it as she tries to settle with Lenny, and a gondola ride turns into a battleship when a juice box and words are thrown.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Life's a Beach: US reality series. Kathy's Oceanside, California getaway promises to be a luxurious escape, but Kyle and Dorit make it far from smooth sailing.
Ant and Dec are back as brother and sister-in-law Joe and Jo - and stepfather and son-in-law Steve and Jordan - take on the Limitless Ladder and a stack of fiendish questions.
Graham Norton invites AJ Odudu, Gok Wan and Charlotte Church to try their luck at spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles to win big for charity.
Reality series. The Bali gang are back in Essex and everyone is reunited. Dan and Ella are delighted to be together again and head off for a romantic getaway.
The Diva Returns: Reality series. Cheshire sees the return of its favourite redhead as Lauren tries to deal with being a local icon now that she's back in reality again.
Get Me Off This Gondola!: US reality series. The ladies scramble to get Guerdy off the gondola and into an ambulance after a traumatic pit stop at the Island of the Dead Dolls.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Twisted Sisterhood: US reality series. The girls' Oceanside getaway gets derailed when a tense exchange between Dorit and Kyle leaves the two at an impasse.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Lesley Garrett, Jools Holland, and Adil Ray trying to 'say what they see' in aid of their chosen charity.
Graham Norton welcomes three new players - doctor Ati, corporate assistant Adam, and social care worker Tracey - as they spin their way to 50,000 pounds and mind the bankrupts.
Stepfather and son-in-law Steve and Jordan return to finish their game before husband-and-wife team Richard and Lorna face the Limitless Ladder and look to win some major money.
Reality series. Princess continues her Dubai holiday and quest for a million followers before she and Junior are stunned by news of their mum's engagement and a possible truce.
The Marrying Kind: Stewie experiences domestic life after ordering a mail order bride. Plus, Peter and Chris become addicted to hotel breakfasts.
Customer of the Week: Lois finds solace at the local coffee shop - however, upon realising they have a Customer of the Week contest, she goes to extreme lengths to win.
Start Me Up: Peter is told by his boss to work from home due to his excessive sweating. Stewie and Chris cause thousands of dollars in damage at an electronics store.
Lumberjerk: US animated comedy series. Stan is forced to partner with Jeff in a lumberjack competition, and Steve, Francine and Snot enter a contest to win a vintage pick-up truck.
Mused and Abused: US animated comedy series. Roger reveals a secret passion to Klaus, and Stan and Francine seek revenge on Bazooka Sharks management.
Gift Card or Buy Trying: Animated comedy. The family decide to split a gift card five ways but have trouble settling on purchases, and Gene tries to avoid a former friend.
The Show (and Tell) Must Go On: Animated comedy. Louise takes a risk for her last show and tell by trying to recover a War of 1812-era cannonball from a beach cave at a high tide.
Reality series. Princess continues her Dubai holiday and quest for a million followers before she and Junior are stunned by news of their mum's engagement and a possible truce.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Where Walks Aphrodite: Animated adventures. Mystery Inc is helpless to stop evil Aphrodite, because her love spell has made everyone but Scooby fall madly in love with each other.
Escape from Mystery Manor: Animation. Investigating the disappearance of the original Mystery Inc team, the gang hears that they were last seen going into an abandoned mansion.
Be Cold, Scooby-Doo!: Animated adventure series. The gang hits the ski slopes, but their snowy fun is soon interrupted by an evil snowman monster eager to scare all trespassers away.
Eating Crow: Animated adventure series. When the gang visit a farm being haunted by a scarecrow ghost, Fred aims to impress the farmer's daughter with his mystery-solving skills.
In Manchester, Max, Denison and Callum go up against each other in a series of shopping challenges hoping to win the affections of Newcastle model Sophiah.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Billie and Greg are at breaking point as their sleepless nights continue, and the Shepherds throw a lavish pool party to remember as Nelly turns nine.
Reality series. The Bali gang are back in Essex and everyone is reunited. Dan and Ella are delighted to be together again and head off for a romantic getaway.
Get Me Off This Gondola!: US reality series. The ladies scramble to get Guerdy off the gondola and into an ambulance after a traumatic pit stop at the Island of the Dead Dolls.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Twisted Sisterhood: US reality series. The girls' Oceanside getaway gets derailed when a tense exchange between Dorit and Kyle leaves the two at an impasse.
Stepfather and son-in-law Steve and Jordan return to finish their game before husband-and-wife team Richard and Lorna face the Limitless Ladder and look to win some major money.
Graham Norton invites celebrities Tom Allen, Michelle Visage and Eddie Kadi to spin the Wheel to get the chance to play for 50,000 pounds for charity.
Reality series. The gang throw Elma and Sammy a 'welcome home' brunch, and Saff tells Harry that she doesn't like the way he is acting after breaking up with Freddie.
The Final Push: Reality series. Paige finally meets her beautiful baby girl, Lauren continues to cling on to the spotlight, and Joe launches a new cupcake venture.
Adios Mexico!: US reality series. The Miami Mamis say adios to Mexico City with a pinata of surprises, and Michael Jordan states his disapproval of Larsa's relationship with his son.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: High Horses and Low Blows: US reality series. The ladies swap their high heels for cowboy boots at a western party where Sutton delivers some blows to Dorit.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Phil Daniels, Steph McGovern, and AJ Odudu all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Graham Norton invites AJ Odudu, Gok Wan and Charlotte Church to try their luck at spinning the Wheel and solving puzzles to win big for charity.
Ant and Dec are here with their never-ending money ladder as husband-and-wife team Richard and Lorna finish their brave game before postman David and his partner Aaron play.
Find out how clever you are - and if you could be in the top one per cent of the UK - as Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show with a top prize of 100,000 pounds.
Who's Brian Now?: Brian finds himself at an animal shelter, and his microchip reveals he had a family before the Griffins, who he discovers are well off and well educated.
Coma Guy: Peter discovers a new love for rocking out to the hits of Van Halen, but his headbanging causes a car accident and he ends up in a coma.
Better Off Meg: A mix-up results in a report that Meg has been killed in a car crash, and she makes the most of the opportunity to start a new life elsewhere.
Stan and Francine and Stan and Francine and Radika: US animated comedy series. Stan and Francine go back in time to settle an argument.
